# Minimal dependencies for GitHub Actions daily pipeline.
# Excludes training / ML-research libs (torch, transformers, lightgbm, catboost,
# vectorbt, shap, matplotlib, pandas-ta, scikit-learn) which are only needed
# locally for backtests and model tuning — not for the nightly data refresh.

# Data fetch
requests>=2.31.0,<3.0.0
beautifulsoup4>=4.12.0,<5.0.0
lxml>=5.0.0,<6.0.0
feedparser>=6.0.10,<7.0.0
yfinance>=0.2.40,<0.3.0
python-dateutil>=2.8.2,<3.0.0

# Data handling
numpy>=1.26.0,<3.0.0
pandas>=2.2.0,<3.0.0
pyarrow>=16.0.0,<19.0.0

# LLM (news scoring + daily predictions + report extraction)
anthropic>=0.34.0,<1.0.0
openai>=1.40.0,<2.0.0           # GitHub Models OpenAI-compatible client

# Director's-report extraction (PDF rendering for vision LLM input)
pymupdf>=1.24.0,<2.0.0

# Mutual Funds Equity Holdings parser (AHL monthly PDF)
pdfplumber>=0.11.0,<1.0.0
